comment.body:
This morning's post Alma included this point about the PM: 

Charm flip is at 5700, the convexity (color) is negative, meaning we should expect overall gamma decay that favors to vol expansion, rather than vol decline. (Into PM, local color is positive in the 5700 - 5745 range)
In otherwords, mechanically, the underlying flows don’t favor for stabilization and gamma vol-swallowing effect. If it still happens, it means strong customer interest in it.
